title: Innopark Ventures Invests INR 5 Crore Seed in Skill Metaverse India, an AI
description: Hyderabad (Telangana) [India], April 3: Skill Metaverse India Private Limited, an AI-first technology company building an AI-native marketplace for influencer and performance marketing, has secured a strategic seed investment of INR 5 crore from Innopark Ventures in December 2025.
